title: DDI-CDI Individual
description: DDI-CDI Individual agent (cls-Individual, extends Agent). Represents a person with name, contact information, and identification.

anyOf.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.
